post:
The Base Set Charizard might be the most iconic card of the 90s.

Designed by Mitsuhiro Arita to look heavy and powerful.
Mine is Ungraded and it's my Childhood card.

Some things are worth going back for. 🔥

#TheRarePick #PokemonCards
